title: $NO_LMK_NULL
text: $NO_LMK_NULL Handle empty primary key triggers as in V5.1. $NO_LMK_NULL Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $NO_LMK_NULL causes the leaveModifiedKey trigger to behave as it did in Version 5.1.
